arts.ttl: “Offered him” | West Ham’s hopes of signing Premier League starlet takes massive hit
arts.sum: West Ham’s hopes of signing Premier League wonderkid have been damaged after manager provides update. Following mixed results from their Summer transfer window, it’s believed that a lot of West Ham’s attention in the coming windows will be placed on signing players from the lower leagues of England, as well as youngsters from Premier League... arts.ttl: “Best decision” | Former Liverpool star says signing for West Ham was greatest decision he ever made
arts.sum: Former Liverpool, Chelsea, and Arsenal player says signing for West Ham was “the best decision” of his career. While he may have played his best football at Anfield, Yossi Benayoun was certainly a great player for West Ham. He lacked a bit in goal involvements, but he was a joy to watch. When playing for...
